'''Adana Vermor''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Economic Advisor]] who monitored economic activities of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. She was unknowingly [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force sensitive]], which helped her in managing the Empire's resources. Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] assigned [[Trevas Jotane]] to observe Vermor, who was suspected of leaking data to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and certain [[Tapani Noble Houses|Noble Houses]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].
